cc:Work.dc:title: Box - UniversalBox
cc:Work.dc:description:
Box with various options for different styles and lids
Created with Boxes.py (https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/) Command line: boxes UniversalBox --FingerJoint_finger=5.0 --FingerJoint_space=5.0 --FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=2.0 --Lid_style=fangbrim --h=150.0 --outside=true --x=200.0 --y=200.0 --qr_code=true --thickness=3.0 Command line short: boxes UniversalBox --FingerJoint_finger=5.0 --FingerJoint_space=5.0 --Lid_style=fangbrim --h=150.0 --x=200.0 --y=200.0 --qr_code=true
